description: A selfie of a smiling woman with long wavy dark hair and green eyes, wearing a colorful abstract-patterned sleeveless zip-up top with blue, green, purple, and orange hues, standing in a lush green park. Behind her are tall palm trees, manicured hedges, white street lamps, a low fence, paved walkways, a bench, and blurred background figures including a man in dark clothing taking the photo. The setting features vibrant greenery, blue sky with scattered white clouds, and bright natural sunlight filtering through leaves, creating a joyful outdoor atmosphere.
location_context: This image appears to be taken in a landscaped urban park in Malta near 35.897422, 14.517167.
time_context: Morning under bright sunny sky with some clouds, around 09:40 local time.
